name: Honeysink
description: Open source network sinkhole that provides a mechanism for detection and prevention of malicious traffic on a given network. Tool: http://www.honeynet.org/node/773. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #482 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Honeysink output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Honeysink output file to parse instead of running it live.
